Dashboard Archive: 2026-04-10 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker-Long Today's data reveals two exceptionally strong long-term performers at the top of the ranking. LINC (rank #1, score 93.9) shows the most consistent momentum profile with a perfect 4-of-4 ratio passes and triple-digit returns across all timeframes: 153.79% over 1 year, 534.47% over 5 years, and 1547.58% over 10 years, while maintaining clean momentum signals and normal volatility. FTI ranks second but displays a concerning anomaly in its 10-year data where returns dropped to 230.9% despite 840% over 5 years, and its relative performance versus SPY deteriorates sharply at the 10-year mark (down to 2.53%), suggesting potential structural changes in the business or sector rotation. Both stocks trade above all moving averages (SMA 30/50/100/200), indicating sustained uptrends, though FTI's longer-term weakness relative to benchmarks warrants caution compared to LINC's consistent outperformance. The correlation patterns show both tickers cluster with Materials (XLB) and Industrials (XLI) sectors, suggesting their gains may be cyclical rather than secular.
